title: RHN Booster
description: ⚡ Boost FPS, 🎮 smoother gameplay & 🛠️ smart QoL upgrades — the ultimate low-end friendly modpack!
body:
🚀 RHN Booster Modpack – Smooth Minecraft, Anytime, Anywhere

Welcome to RHN Booster, a modpack designed for every Minecraft player who wants higher FPS, smoother performance, and extra features without losing the original vanilla vibe. Whether you’re on a low-end laptop, a mid-range PC, or even a high-end setup, this pack is made to give you the best experience possible. 🎮✨

⚡ Who Is This Modpack For?

👉 Players with low-end PCs/laptops who struggle with lag and low FPS.
👉 Mid-range & high-end players who want extra smoothness + stability.
👉 Anyone who wants FPS boosting combined with quality-of-life features.
👉 Survival, PvP, and casual players who want faster, cleaner, and lag-free gameplay.

🔥 What Does RHN Booster Do?

✅ Boosts FPS – Run Minecraft faster and smoother.
✅ Reduces Lag & Stutters – Faster chunk loading and rendering.
✅ Adds Smart Features – Extra tools and QoL upgrades for an easier life.
✅ Improves Visuals – Cleaner, more immersive look without heavy performance cost.
✅ Balanced Experience – Perfect mix of performance + features.

🎨 Key Features & Mods Included

⚡ Performance Mods: Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore, Entity Culling – maximum FPS boost!

🎨 Visual Enhancements: Iris Shaders, Dynamic Lights, Better Grass/Leaves, Fresh Animations – beauty + smoothness.

🛠️ Quality of Life Mods: AppleSkin, Jade/WTHIT, Inventory Sorting, Zoom Mod – more control, less hassle.

🚀 Startup & Memory Fixes: LazyDFU, Memory Leak Fix – faster launch and stable sessions.

🌐 Multiplayer Without Servers: e4mc lets you play Java multiplayer directly, without needing to set up a server.

🔗 Connected Visuals: Continuity adds connected glass, bookshelves, sandstone, and more — giving you details vanilla never had.

🌍 Why Choose RHN Booster?

✔️ Optimized for all PCs – from low-end to high-end.
✔️ Survival Friendly – smooth exploration with reduced lag.
✔️ PvP Ready – faster FPS = better reaction times.
✔️ Builder Friendly – clear visuals & stable performance.
✔️ User Friendly – just install and play, no complicated setup.

✨ Final Words

With RHN Booster, you’re not just playing Minecraft — you’re experiencing it the smoothest and most optimized way possible. 🎮🔥

📌 Created by: Rehan
📷 Instagram: @reh4n.07_

👉 Install now and give your Minecraft the BOOST it deserves! 🚀
